_publications._publicationTitle: Selective nitration of Hsp90 acts as a metabolic switch promoting tumor cell proliferation.

_contextSnippet: significant decrease of ∼20 % and ∼30 % in cell growth when treated with the selective P2X7R inhibitor KN62 (10 μM) for 24 and 48 h, respectively
details: P2X7R inhibitor KN62 (10 μM) caused ~20% and ~30% decrease in cell growth at 24h and 48h respectively, and abrogated proliferative effects of nitrated Hsp90
